# Copilot Instructions — kafkade

## Commands

```bash
npm run dev       # Dev server at localhost:4321
npm run build     # Production build → dist/
npm run preview   # Preview production build locally
```

No test suite or linter configured.

## Architecture

**Astro 5 static site** with Tailwind CSS v4, deployed to Cloudflare Pages.

### Layout hierarchy

```
BaseLayout        — HTML shell, <head>, SEO/OG meta, theme init script
├── PageLayout    — Header + Footer + centered content container
└── BlogPost      — Header + Footer + article header (date, tags) + prose styling
```

`PageLayout` accepts a `wide` prop (default `false`) for `max-w-2xl` vs `max-w-5xl`.

### Content collections

One collection: `blog` (defined in `src/content.config.ts`). Uses the Astro glob loader pattern:

```typescript
loader: glob({ base: './src/content/blog', pattern: '**/*.{md,mdx}' })
```

Blog post frontmatter schema: `title`, `description`, `pubDate`, `updatedDate?`, `tags[]`, `draft`.

Posts go in `src/content/blog/` as `.md` or `.mdx` files. Routes are generated by `src/pages/blog/[...slug].astro`.

## Git Policy

- **Never commit automatically.** Do not run `git commit`, `git push`, or any
  other command that creates or modifies commits without explicit user approval.
- Always present proposed changes and let the user decide when to commit.
- This applies to all agents, sub-agents, and automated workflows.


## Conventions

### Theming (dark/light)

- Dark mode is the default.
- Theme state lives on `<html data-theme="dark|light">` and persists to `localStorage`.
- `BaseLayout` has an inline `<script is:inline>` that reads localStorage before paint to prevent flash.
- In Tailwind classes, target light mode with `[html[data-theme=light]_&]:` prefix:
  ```
  text-[--color-text-dark] [html[data-theme=light]_&]:text-[--color-text-light]
  ```
- In plain CSS, use `[data-theme="light"]` selector or `:global(html[data-theme="light"])` inside `<style>` blocks.

### Color system

All colors are defined as CSS custom properties in the `@theme` block of `src/styles/global.css`. Reference them as `var(--color-*)` in CSS or `[--color-*]` in Tailwind arbitrary values. The palette:

| Token            | Hex       | Role                           |
|-----------------|-----------|--------------------------------|
| `midnight`       | `#010221` | Background (dark)              |
| `teal`           | `#0A7373` | Links, accents, interactive    |
| `teal-light`     | `#0D9E9E` | Hover states for teal          |
| `sage`           | `#B7BF99` | Muted text, borders            |
| `amber`          | `#EDAA25` | CTAs, highlights               |
| `amber-light`    | `#F5C04A` | Hover states for amber         |
| `ember`          | `#C43302` | Destructive/emphasis           |
| `surface-light`  | `#F5F5F0` | Background (light)             |
| `surface-dark`   | `#020318` | Card backgrounds (dark)        |
| `text-light`     | `#1A1A2E` | Body text (light mode)         |
| `text-dark`      | `#E8E8E0` | Body text (dark mode)          |

### Typography

Three font families loaded via `@fontsource`:
- **Display** (`--font-display`): Playfair Display — headings only
- **Body** (`--font-body`): Inter — everything else
- **Mono** (`--font-mono`): JetBrains Mono Variable — code blocks

### Tailwind CSS v4

This project uses Tailwind v4 with the Vite plugin (`@tailwindcss/vite`), **not** the PostCSS plugin or `@astrojs/tailwind` integration. Configuration is done via `@theme` blocks in CSS, not `tailwind.config.mjs`.

### Components

Astro components with TypeScript `interface Props`. Stateless — client-side behavior uses `<script>` tags with vanilla JS (no framework islands). Social links and project data are hardcoded in component files (`SocialLinks.astro`, `projects.astro`).

### Brand assets

`brand/` contains the design system docs and SVG logos. The logo is an abstract mountain peak mark (not a letterform). `brand/colors.css` is a reference copy — the source of truth for colors is the `@theme` block in `src/styles/global.css`.
